posts.title: Welcome to My Blog
posts.excerpt: Starting a blog to share updates on projects, learning experiences, and other interesting things I'm working on.
posts.content:
Welcome to my blog! I'm starting this as a way to document my journey in computer science, machine learning, and software engineering.

Here I'll share updates on projects I'm working on, things I'm learning, and other interesting developments in my work and studies.

Stay tuned for more posts!
